long_description:
SunRice Original Thin Rice Cakes are a versatile snack for any time of day, and the perfect base for your favourite topping.

A great alternative to bread, they are a great source of wholegrain, made with 100% Australian-grown wholegrain brown rice.

Light, crunchy and delicious, SunRice Thin Rice Cakes are made with all natural ingredients and are gluten free.

Top with smoked salmon, cream cheese and Spanish onion for a delicious snack, or try hazelnut spread with fresh strawberries and blueberries for a different take on dessert.
  • Gluten Free

  • No Artificial Colours

  • Made with Australian Brown Rice

  • Made with the goodness of wholegrain

Savour in rich beef noodles with an Asian inspired twist, with our Beef Instant Rice Noodles. 

Perfectly balanced with hints of star anise, cinnamon and soy sauce, these delicious rice noodles are perfect for lunch, dinner or an on-the-go snack. 

These noodles are gluten-free and perfect if you are looking for a lighter, rice-based alternative to traditional wheat noodles. 
  • Made with Organic Brown Rice Noodles

  • Gluten free

  • Vegetarian

  • No Added MSG

  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives.

  • Baked not Fried.

  • Cup & Lid Recyclable.

ingredients: Cooked Basmati Rice (98%) (Water, Basmati Rice), Vegetable Oil, Stabiliser (471).
long_description:
Long and slender grains, the gateway to Indian cooking.
This blend of aromatic Basmati and Long Grain Rice is the gateway to Indian cuisine and produces a light fluffy texture ideal for absorbing flavours.

A drier rice, Basmati grains will remain separate, which makes it a staple of Indian cooking. It tastes great with tandoori and in curries such as the classic butter chicken, or as an alternative base for a Thai massaman curry.

For best results, Basmati rice should be rinsed and then soaked for 30 minutes prior to cooking.

All rice is naturally gluten free.

A drier rice, Basmati grains will remain separate, which makes it a staple of Indian cooking. It tastes great with tandoori and in curries such as the classic butter chicken, or as an alternative base for a Thai massaman curry.

All rice is naturally gluten free.

allergens: Free From Gluten
ingredients: Jasmine White Rice.
long_description:
• Long grain, ideal for Southeast Asian dishes
  • Commonly used in stir fries and curries
  • Slightly sticky but fluffy texture
  • Excellent for fried rice, stir fry, and curry recipes
  • SunRice Jasmine rice has a delicious fragrance
  • Evokes sights and sounds of Southeast Asia
  • Rinse rice before cooking; cook without salt to preserve fragrance
  • Naturally gluten free

    This grain will be slightly sticky but still fluffy. Its separating qualities and fragrance, make it a great choice for a wide variety of fried rice, stir fry and curry recipes.

    SunRice Jasmine rice, is known for its delicious fragrance. Use this rice to create a dish that evokes the sights and sounds of Southeast Asia, from the street vendors of Bangkok to Saigon.

    For best results, rinse this rice before cooking and cook without salt to preserve its fragrance.

    All rice is naturally gluten free.
  • Gluten Free

ingredients: Rice
long_description:
• Blend of aromatic Basmati and Long Grain Rice
  • Light fluffy texture, ideal for absorbing flavours
  • Basmati grains remain separate, suitable for Indian cooking
  • Pairs well with tandoori, butter chicken, and Thai massaman curry
  • Rinse and soak for 30 minutes before cooking
  • Naturally gluten free

    A drier rice, Basmati grains will remain separate, which makes it a staple of Indian cooking. It tastes great with tandoori and in curries such as the classic butter chicken, or as an alternative base for a Thai massaman curry.

    For best results, Basmati rice should be rinsed and then soaked for 30 minutes prior to cooking.

    All rice is naturally gluten free.

name: Medium Grain Pouch

ingredients: Jasmine White Rice.
long_description:
• Long grain, ideal for Southeast Asian dishes
  • Commonly used in stir fries and curries
  • Slightly sticky but fluffy texture
  • Excellent for fried rice, stir fry, and curry recipes
  • SunRice Jasmine rice has a delicious fragrance
  • Evokes sights and sounds of Southeast Asia
  • Rinse rice before cooking; cook without salt to preserve fragrance
  • Naturally gluten free

    This grain will be slightly sticky but still fluffy. Its separating qualities and fragrance, make it a great choice for a wide variety of fried rice, stir fry and curry recipes.

    SunRice Jasmine rice, is known for its delicious fragrance. Use this rice to create a dish that evokes the sights and sounds of Southeast Asia, from the street vendors of Bangkok to Saigon.

    For best results, rinse this rice before cooking and cook without salt to preserve its fragrance.

    All rice is naturally gluten free.
  • Gluten Free

It's balanced with broccoli and sweet potato chips dusted with salt, pepper and thyme.

long_description:
Full of flavour and packed with protein, our Portugese Chicken & Rice is one meal you're going to want to add to your cart.

The meal features tender slices of chicken rubbed with Portuguese-inspired spices and a generous side of fluffy rice made flavourful with sweet corn kernels and spices like smoked paprika and turmeric. Then, there's the creamy smoked paprika sauce that's to die for.

It takes our chefs approximately two hours to make all the elements of this meal, but for you, it's done in a few minutes.
name: Fueld Portuguese Chicken & Rice

long_description:
Treat yourself to Arnott's Gaiety chocolate wafer biscuits, an indulgent combination of sweet and crunchy. These chocolate biscuits feature a wafer centre covered in smooth chocolate, giving you the most luscious snack experience. For a little Friday afternoon snack or for taking a moment to savour, these sweet biscuits are perfect for sharing with friends and family or for an indulgent me-time treat. Truly a timeless favourite in the world of chocolate biscuits.
  • - Layers of crisp wafer and hazelnut-flavoured chocolate cream

  • - Each wafer biscuit is covered in Arnott's real chocolate

  • - Our chocolate biscuits are made from the finest cocoa ingredients and natural milk products

  • - Ideal for a variety of occasions, from a midday pick-me-up snack to a chocolate dessert option

  • - Perfect for those who appreciate the traditional flavours of chocolate biscuits with a crispy, airy wafer texture
name: Gaiety Chocolate Biscuits

Dark chocolate refined with fine flavor cocoa from Ecuador and with 100% exquisite Italian hazelnuts freshly roasted by Loacker

Arnott's Milk Chocolate Royals biscuits are sweet choc biscuits made from the finest ingredients. With 12 choc biscuits in each pack, they're the perfect reward for sharing with friends and family or when you're craving an indulgent me-time treat. With a buttery biscuit and sweet raspberry filling topped proudly with a fluffy marshmallow and coated in smooth milk chocolate, this kind of luxe will make you feel like a royal. Made from the finest cocoa ingredients and natural milk products, take a bite and savour the flavour of royalty.
  • - An indulgent sweet chocolate biscuit

  • - Great for sharing

  • - Australian made and loved

  • - No artificial colours of flavours

  • - There is no substitute

The chocolate biscuit coating with extra chocolate covers two crunchy biscuits, luscious, velvety mint cream and an extra gooey chocolate centre. Perfect for sharing special moments with friends or enjoying a quiet indulgence, Tim Tam Deluxe dark chocolate biscuits with mint are the ultimate way to satisfy your sweets cravings.
  • Chocolate-coated biscuits made with irresistible real dark chocolate

  • Perfect snack to enjoy by yourself or to share with friends

  • Smooth dark chocolate coating, crunchy biscuit and a gooey centre

  • Pairs well with milk, coffee or tea

  • A unique twist on a beloved Aussie chocolate biscuit

long_description:
With its much-loved extra choc, delicious velvety cream, and a moreish extra gooey centre, the Tim Tam Deluxe range is our most indulgent range ever! The newest flavour addition, Arnott's Tim Tam Deluxe Cafe Latte, is available now in all major supermarkets and independent retailers, continuing to offer Tim Tam fans an even more indulgent bikkie.

 

As the perfect complement to your next cuppa, to ‘Bite, Sip and Slam' or simply to indulge on its own, Deluxe Cafe Latte promises to tingle the tastebuds of coffee connoisseurs and chocolate lovers around Australia starting with a delectable caramel coffee aroma. This mouth-watering chocolate biscuit combines a smooth blend of chocolate, robust coffee flavours and an extra gooey caramel centre contrasted with the classic Tim Tam crunch, all enrobed in decadent milk chocolate. 

 

What more could you wish for?

 
  • - Extra gooey caramel centre

  • - Made in Australia

Made with quality dark chocolate and pure mint oil, these mint choc biscuits are perfect for the whole family to enjoy any time of the day. Consisting of a crunchy chocolate biscuit, layered with mint cream and coated in decadent dark chocolate, one will not be enough. Arnott's TeeVee Snacks Malt Sticks chocolate biscuits are here to brighten your afternoon fun, now in a larger value pack! They're the perfect bite-sized chocolate biscuit snack which makes them ideal for decorating kids birthday cakes or putting out as part of a party spread. Pop open a pack when you're looking for the perfect chocolate snack to share with others at home, watching your favourite TV show. Arnott's large value pack of TeeVee Snacks Malt Sticks chocolate biscuits are the ultimate sweet biscuit to indulge in, one munch at a time!

  • - Perfect to share with your friends and family

Each chocolate biscuit is shaped like a cute teddy bear and coated in smooth, rich chocolate. They're the perfect addition to any moment, whether you're sharing an afternoon of fun with the family or a picnic treat with friends.   • - 12 biscuits per pack, making them an ideal snack

Crispy wafer biscuits with hazelnut cream filling (47%) and chopped hazelnuts, coated with milk chocolate (35%).

With 100% exquisite Italian hazelnuts freshly roasted by Loacker and milk chocolate refined with fine flavor cocoa from Ecuador

More than good*
* The milk chocolate coating, refined with fine flavor cocoa from Ecuador, reveals two crispy wafers with a generous hazelnut cream filling. The "Cocoa Farming Program" and the "Italian Hazelnut Orchards" project aim to improve quality and sustainability.

Find your moment of indulgence with Arnott's Tim Tam Original Chocolate Biscuits. Made with irresistible real chocolate, these biscuits are the perfect way to indulge in the afternoon or unwind at the end of a long day. It's easy to see why Tim Tam is Australia's most-loved chocolate biscuit. What more could you wish for?
  • - Australia's most-loved chocolate biscuits

  • - Made with irresistible real chocolate

  • - For your moment of afternoon indulgence

  • - Perfect chocolate biscuits for sharing with loved ones

  • - Easy snack to enjoy at home, work or on-the-go

long_description:
Just imagine the iconic chocolatey indulgence of a Tim Tam Original biscuit with salty crackery bursts all in one chocolate bite. Originally an April Fool's collaboration, Tim Tam x Jatz rallied a nation with thousands of Aussies calling for this delicious biscuit treat to be so much more than a classic prank. Whether you're sharing with friends or just treating yourself, Tim Tam Jatz brings together the best of both worlds with its irresistible combination of sweet and savoury.
  • - Sweet and salty chocolate-coated biscuit treat

  • - Chocolate-coated biscuits inspired by Jatz

  • - Chocolate-coated biscuits with the perfect balance of sweet and salty

  • - Ideal biscuit to share with friends, family or as a solo treat

  • - Easy snack to enjoy at home, work or on-the-go

Arnott's TeeVee Snacks Original chocolate biscuits are here to brighten your afternoon fun, one munch at a time! They're the perfect bite-sized chocolate biscuit snack which makes them ideal for decorating kids birthday cakes or putting out as part of a party spread. Pop open a pack with friends and family for delicious bites of pure fun, whether you're after a shared morning treat or a weekend pick-me-up. Arnott's TeeVee Snacks Original chocolate biscuits are the ultimate sweet biscuit for when you need some fun!
  • - Bite-sized sweet crunchy biscuits covered in chocolate

  • - Perfect snacking size

  • - Pop open for delicious bites of fun

  • - Perfect to share with your friends and family

  • - Made in Australia
name: Teevee Snacks Biscuits Original

  • - Perfect chocolate biscuits for sharing with loved ones

  • - Smooth triple chocolate coating, crunchy biscuit and a luscious velvety centre

  • - Pairs well with milk, coffee or tea

  • - A timeless Aussie snack

The combination of intense dark chocolate and the classic Tim Tam texture creates an irresistible snack that satisfies any chocolate lover. Whether you're enjoying a snack with your favourite coffee, sharing with friends, or savouring a quiet moment of indulgence, these chocolate biscuits bring a touch of decadence to any occasion.

  • - Australia's most-loved chocolate biscuits

  • - Each biscuit is wrapped in a smooth dark chocolate coating

  • - For your moment of afternoon indulgence

  • - Perfect chocolate biscuits for sharing with loved ones

  • - A decadent twist on a beloved Aussie chocolate biscuit

Made with quality dark chocolate and pure mint oil, these mint choc biscuits are perfect for after dinner or any time of the day. Whether you're looking for a delicious sweet treat or something to bring to a party, Mint Slices never disappoint. Consisting of a crunchy chocolate biscuit, layered with mint cream and coated in decadent dark chocolate, one will not be enough. Arnott's Mint Slice mint chocolate biscuits are bound to go quick in any house.
  • - Mint cream and chocolate coating

  • - Australian made and loved

  • - Great for sharing

  • - A family favourite

  • - There is no substitute

Find your moment of indulgence with Arnott's Tim Tam Strawberries & Cream Chocolate Biscuits, the ultimate fruity treat. This irresistible new flavour combines the iconic crunch of two biscuits, a delicious strawberry cream centre, all wrapped in a smooth, creamy layer of white chocolate. These biscuits are the perfect way to indulge in the afternoon or unwind at the end of a long day. It's easy to see why Tim Tam is Australia's most-loved chocolate biscuit. What more could you wish for?
  • Made with 3 irresistible layers

  • Smooth, creamy white chocolate covers two crunchy biscuits

  • Delicious strawberry cream centre

  • What more could you wish for?

long_description:
Crafted to sweet perfection, these shortbread biscuits offer the classic, buttery flavour of shortbread combined with a smooth, creamy filling, all in a gluten free biscuit. Each bite delivers a delightful sweetness and crumbly texture, making them an ideal treat for those who avoid gluten but still crave delicious shortbread biscuits. This gluten-free version of an iconic Aussie sweet biscuit is perfect with an afternoon cup of tea and shared with loved ones.
  • - Gluten free biscuits suitable for gluten avoiders

  • - Buttery shortbread biscuits filled with delicious smooth cream

  • - Sweet biscuits made without artificial colours and preservatives

  • - Perfectly crafted gluten free biscuits to offer the same beloved taste

  • - These gluten free biscuits are suitable for any occasion, from casual snacking to serving at social gatherings

long_description:
OREO Mini Sandwich Biscuits inspired by Cadbury Caramilk are the same OREO cookies you know and love, just mini.

Delightfully combining sweet OREO biscuits with a delicious Cadbury Caramilk inspired creme. OREO mini's inspired by Cadbury Caramilk are the perfect on the go snack! These mini sweet cream munchable biscuits are the perfect size for sharing with family and friends. Whether you need sweet biscuits for baking ingredients, ice cream decorations or delicious birthday party treats - OREO Minis are the perfect snack to share. TWIST, LICK, DUNK in a glass of milk, or enjoy with your cup of tea or coffee - OREO Mini's are the playful biscuit to pair with your drink of choice!
  • OREO Mini Sandwich Biscuits inspired by Cadbury Caramilk, 157g Box

  • Muchable golden OREO cookies with a smooth Cadbury Caramilk inspired crme

  • The 157g box of OREO Mini's is perfect movie night treat to share with the family

  • Elevate your baking by decorating your favourite desserts with these miniature OREO Cookies

  • These playful mini OREO biscuits are the perfect solution for snacking at home, in the office, or on the go

  • Enjoy the taste of OREO Mini cookies with your favourite person or serve them at your next party or social gathering.

long_description:
Our Anzac biscuit is a tribute to time-honored simplicity—made with rolled oats, coconut, and golden syrup for that unmistakable chew and rich, home-baked flavor. Crisp at the edges, soft in the center, and full of hearty character.
It's the kind of biscuit that doesn't need reinvention—just respect.

Handcrafted using traditional family recipe since 1941.

It's OREO with a twist! With it's delicious creme flavour inspired by Cadbury Caramilk - with 2 x creme compared to Original OREO cookies, double the YUM! Delightfully combining sweet OREO cookies with a doubled Cadbury Caramilk inspired creme. The OREO sandwich cookies offers a truly original taste sensation, unleashing your playful spirit. Twist, lick, and dunk to experience the ultimate OREO moment or simply enjoy crushed over your favourite ice cream. The perfect snack for bonding with loved ones, OREO Cookies also make an excellent coffee break companion. Add them to your favorite dessert recipes to wow family and friends or take them with you everywhere you go for the ultimate biscuit crowd-pleaser. Vist oreo.com.au for recipe inspiration.
  • Cadbury Caramilk inspired flavoured sandwich cookies with doubled Cadbury Caramilk inspired flavoured crme

  • OREO Double Stuff Cadbruy Caramilk inspired flavoured cookies, the perfect addition to your favourite baking recipe.

  • Made to be shared, OREO Cookies are perfect for snacking or enjoying as a treat for the whole family

  • Each pack of OREO Double Stuff sandwich biscuits inspired by Cadbury Caramilk 131g contains 11 cookies

  • Twist, lick, dunk! Enjoy OREO your way or with a glass of fresh milk

  • 2 x creme compared to Original OREO cookies, double the YUM!.

Coles Chocolate Cream Biscuits 140g

  • Chocolate cream biscuits
  • Rainforest alliance certified cocoa
  • No artificial colours and flavours


These Coles Chocolate Cream Biscuits are a classic tea-time treat. With their creamy chocolate filling sandwiched between two crisp chocolate biscuits, they're the ideal accompaniment to tea and coffee. Coles Chocolate Cream Biscuits have a light, crunchy texture and just the right amount of sweetness and crunch. Popular with all ages, they're great for nibbling on or dunking into a cuppa or glass of milk. Keep a pack in the pantry for when friends come to visit or when you've got a hungry after-school crowd to feed.


Coles Chocolate Cream Biscuits not only taste great, they're free from artificial colours and flavours.

long_description:
There's nothing more iconically Aussie than the snapping of a Scotch Finger biscuit. The buttery taste of these sweet biscuits is unmatched and an Aussie favourite for a reason. Whether you're looking for a tea time treat or a sweet biscuit for after dinner, look no further than an original Scotch Finger. Inject a bit of fun into your morning with an Arnott's Scotch Finger biscuit, made to snap and dunk in your favourite cuppa. It's the perfect and most delicious choice for an indulgent me-time treat.
  • - Iconic shortbread fingers

  • - Snap and share

  • - No artificial colours or flavours

  • - Aussie made, Aussie loved

  • - There is no substitute

long_description:
Get ready for a *playful* twist on your favorite snack! Meet the new pink OREO - OREO inspired by PASCALL pink and white marshmallows! Double the marshmallow-flavoured creme means double the joy in every bite! 
Twist, lick, and dunk to your heart's content, or break them up over a bowl of ice cream for an instant dessert upgrade. Picture this: you and your family sharing a pack during a cozy movie night, or sneaking a few at your desk when you need a little afternoon pick-me-up. Feeling extra? Treat yourself to a Pascall Mashmallow inspired OREO milkshake, or add them to your weekend baking for a surprising twist in your favorite dessert recipes.
Whether you're lounging on the couch, hosting a party, or sneaking them from the pantry for a little “me-time,” these OREO cookies bring a whole new level of fun and flavour. Take them everywhere for the ultimate snack experience—because life's too short for just *regular* cookies! Visit oreo.com.au for recipe inspiration.
  • Pascall Marshmallow inspired flavoured sandwich cookies with doubled Pascall Marshmallow inspired flavoured creme

  • OREO Double Stuff Pascall Marshmallow inspired flavoured cookies, the perfect addition to your favourite baking recipe.

  • Made to be shared, OREO Cookies are perfect for snacking or enjoying as a treat for the whole family

  • Each pack of OREO Double Stuff sandwich biscuits inspired by Pascall Marshmallows 131g contains 11 cookies

  • Twist, lick, dunk! Enjoy OREO your way or with a glass of fresh milk

  • 2 x creme compared to Original OREO cookies, double the YUM!.

Whether you're unwinding with a cup of tea, enjoying a quiet moment, or sharing with friends and family, Arnott's Kingston cream biscuits are ideal for when you're craving a little treat. Each Kingston cream biscuit has a crisp, golden base that gives you that satisfying crunch, complemented by a layer of smooth, creamy chocolate. With their timeless taste, these cream biscuits are a cherish favourite that are welcomed to any snack time.
  • - Cream biscuits that chocolate lovers will adore

  • - Pairs perfectly with a cup of tea or coffee

  • - Satisfies cravings and elevates snack time

  • - Ideal sweet biscuits for sharing or enjoying as a solo treat

  • - Features classic, Aussie loved flavours

Share moments of warmth and deliciousness with Cadbury Cookies Choc Centre! These generously sized, crunchy cookies are loaded with Cadbury milk chocolate chips and boast a decadent, choc-filled center. Perfect for sharing with friends and family during cozy afternoons, these cookies are a delightful treat that pairs perfectly with a hot beverage. For an extra touch of indulgence, pop them in the microwave for 10 seconds and enjoy a warm, melty sensation. Bring a smile to everyone around the table and share in the delicious taste of Cadbury Cookies Choc Centre.
  • Ideal to share

  • Cadbury milk chocolate chips

  • Choc filled centre

  • Microwave for warm and gooey experience

long_description:
Bring the family together with this delicious assortment of seven of your all-time favourite Arnott's sweet biscuits. This collection includes the buttery goodness of Nice plain biscuits, the iconic taste of Milk Arrowroot plain biscuits, the rich and chocolatey Choc Ripple, the crumbly and comforting Scotch Finger, the fun and delightful Teddy Bear, the sweet and crunchy Butternut Snap, and the smooth and mild Milk Coffee. This collection of crunchy, plain biscuits is perfect for sharing and contains no artificial flavours. There's something for everyone in this pack. Perfect for filling the biscuit tin and enjoying the simple everyday pleasure of dunking them in your morning cuppa or sharing with friends and family.
  • - Seven of Australia's favourite Arnott's biscuits for sharing and dunking

  • - A perfect mix of classic plain and sweet biscuits that have been loved for generations

  • - Ideal for sharing with family and friends, these cookies & biscuits are a staple in any household

  • - Each biscuit variety is individually Aussie made and Aussie loved, making it easy to offer a selection that everyone will enjoy

  • - Biscuits made without artificial colours and flavours
name: Family Favourites Assorted Biscuits

long_description:
Biscoff biscuits have been delighting people around the world for generations. With their unique delicious caramelised taste and crunchy bite, they're an irresistible treat, whether you're enjoying some me-time, having a hot drink with friends or as an on-the-go snack throughout the day. It's also a great ingredient to include in your home baking recipes like cheesecake, cupcakes, and many others. Made with non-GMO ingredients, our biscuits are vegan and contain no artificial flavours or colours.
  • A delicious crunchy biscuit with a unique caramelized taste

  • Lotus Biscoff has the same unique recipe since 1932

  • Our biscuit is a perfect match with coffee and tea or a delicious treat on its own.

  • Lotus Biscoff is a great ingredient for your home baking recipes like tiramisu or cheesecake

  • Made with a handful of natural ingredients

  • No artificial flavors, colours or preservatives.

  • Vegan friendly.

There's nothing better than Arnott's Malt 'O' Milk biscuits with a glass of milk. If you're craving a me-time moment, cosy up on the couch and grab a packet of these golden biscuits. Arnott's Malt 'O' Milk malt biscuits are the perfect plain biscuits for a morning tea treat or dunked in your evening cuppa. If you're in the mood to get creative in the kitchen, this sweet biscuit is a great addition to a fun afternoon of baking. Whip up a cheesecake or enjoy these sweet biscuits on their own. You will be screaming 'O' with the gorgeous flavour of the Malt 'O' Milk.
  • - The original Arnott's Malt 'O' Milk

  • - Dunkable

  • - Perfect to bake and create at home

  • - No artificial flavours or preservatives

  • - Aussie made, Aussie loved

Can you tell which time is on each sweet biscuit? They are all different! These charming biscuits are a perfect blend of fun and flavour, each made to resemble a clock face, making them a playful way for kids to learn to tell the time. Perfect for party snacks or a sweet treat. Help kids learn to tell the time with our playful and colourful clocks.

  • - Sweet biscuits with a fun twist

  • - Adds a fun, interactive element to any occasion

  • - A fun kids treat

  • - Aussie made and Aussie loved biscuits

long_description:
With its melt-in-your-mouth crumbliness and rich buttery taste, now even those following a gluten free diet can enjoy classic Arnott's Scotch Finger biscuits. These sweet biscuits retain the rich taste and texture, making them perfect for a me-time treat or a bit of afternoon fun. Made to snap, dunk and share any time, whether you're looking for a pick-me-up or putting your feet up with a cup of hot tea, Arnott's Scotch Finger Gluten Free Biscuits are the perfect simple pleasure.
  • - Classic buttery taste, but gluten free

  • - Take these sweet biscuits with you to work, school, or enjoy them at home

  • - Pairs perfectly with your favourite hot beverages

  • - Perfectly crafted biscuits to offer the same beloved taste

  • - These gluten free biscuits are suitable for any occasion, from casual snacking to serving at social gatherings

They call it a classic for a reason. OREO Cookies delightfully combine two choc cookie and a sweet vanilla creme filling. OREO sandwich cookies offer a truly original taste sensation, unleashing your playful spirit. Twist, lick, and dunk to experience the ultimate OREO moment or simply enjoy cushed over your favourite ice cream. The perfect after lunch snack and excellent coffee break companion. Add them to your favorite dessert recipes to keep your family and friends coming back for more or take them with you everywhere you go for the ultimate biscuit crowd-pleaser.
  • OREO Original sandwich cookies consisting of two choc cookies with sweet vanilla creme filling

  • Made to be shared, OREO Cookies are perfect for snacking or enjoying as a treat for the whole family

  • Each pack of OREO Original Sandwich Cookies 128g contains 14 cookies

  • Twist, lick, dunk! Enjoy OREO your way or with a glass of fresh milk

  • The perfect sweet biscuit treat, for after lunch treats.

Arnott's Tina Wafers are a colourful Aussie icon. Thin crisp layers of wafer in three gorgeous flavours, they're a perfect treat for little (and big) kids alike. Take a packet of Arnott's Tina Wafers to the park or pool for a delicious play-time snack. These wafer biscuits are a great for an afternoon snack. For the grown-ups, they're a great biscuit for sharing with friends when you're out and about. Vanilla, raspberry or chocolate cream? Don't worry Miss Tina has you covered with all 3 flavours of crisp deliciousness in the one pack.
  • - Crisp wafers filled with scrumptious raspberry, vanilla and chocolate-flavoured cream

  • - Perfect sweet treat

  • - Made in Australia

  • - There is no substitute

  • - The perfect sweet treat for kids and adults

long_description:
Nutella Biscuits: The Ultimate Crunchy Chocolate & Hazelnut Treat! Get ready to discover your new favourite snack! Nutella Biscuits are a dream come true for every Aussie chocolate lover, combining a perfectly crunchy biscuit with a generous, creamy heart of beloved Nutella hazelnut chocolate spread. These delicious cookies are baked to perfection, offering a delightful textural contrast that will have you reaching for more. Perfect for sharing with loved ones, enjoying with your cuppa, or simply indulging in a

moment of pure bliss.

  • The Best of Both Worlds: Experience the satisfying crunch of a classic biscuit fused with the smooth, irresistible creaminess of genuine Nutella. It's the ultimate combination for any chocolate and cookie enthusiast, offering a truly unique taste sensation.

  • Designed for Sharing Moments: Nutella Biscuits are crafted for connection! Gather your family and friends for a delightful sharing experience - perfect for picnics, afternoon tea, or simply making everyday moments sweeter. These delicious cookies are sure to bring smiles all around.

  • Beyond Your Average Biscuit: Elevate your snack time! With their rich Nutella filling and satisfying crunch, these biscuits offer a delicious alternative to plain cookies, ordinary chocolate bars, or other snacks. They're a treat that truly stands out.

  • Freshness in Every Bite: Our convenient, resealable share pack is designed to keep your Nutella Biscuits perfectly fresh and crunchy from the first one to the last. Enjoy that incredible flavour and texture every single time, whether at home or on-the-go.

  • The Taste You Love, Baked In: Everything you adore about Nutella's unique hazelnut taste is now baked into a delightful biscuit. Made with quality ingredients like wheat flour and cane sugar, these chocolate biscuits offer a genuinely satisfying and delicious snack experience.

Arnott's The Original Shredded Wheatmeal biscuits are a delicious pantry staple that everyone will love.

Perfect paired with your favourite tea or coffee, or for long lunches, BBQ's, birthday celebrations, festive entertaining, christmas, new years, easter, spring carnival or casual get togethers with family and friends any time of the year.

long_description:
Biscoff biscuits have been delighting people around the world for generations. With their unique delicious caramelised taste and crunchy bite, they're an irresistible treat, whether you're enjoying some me-time, having a hot drink with friends or as an on-the-go snack throughout the day. It's also a great ingredient to include in your home baking recipes like cheesecake, cupcakes, and many others. Made with non-GMO ingredients, our biscuits are vegan and contain no artificial flavours or colours.
  • - Lotus Biscoff has the same unique recipe since 1932

  • - Our biscuit is a perfect match with coffee and tea or a delicious treat on its own.

  • - Perfect snack pack with #biscuits for purses, backpacks, lunchboxes or snacking on the go.

  • - RSPO Cerftified Palm oil and non GMO

  • - No artificial flavours, colours or preservatives

  • - Vegan friendly.

long_description:
Add a splash of colour and fun to your snack time with Arnott's Hundreds & Thousands sweet biscuits. These cheerful biscuits start with a deliciously buttery base that melts in your mouth. Each biscuit is then topped with a thick layer of vibrant pink icing, adorned with a generous sprinkle of colourful hundreds and thousands, creating a treat that's as fun to look at as it is to eat. They're the perfect biscuit for kids' little fingers to enjoy for some afternoon fun, as a sweet treat or as a shared snack when out and about with friends.
  • - A moment of magic to complement any beverage

  • - Colourful, sweet biscuits to enjoy with friends

  • - Adds a pop of colour to any snack table

  • - A nostalgic sweet biscuit that brings back happy memories

  • - Ideal for adding a festive touch to any occasion
name: Hundreds & Thousands Biscuits

long_description:
Does it get more iconic than Arnott's Milk Arrowroot plain biscuits? These Aussie favourite sweet plain biscuits are perfect for dunking in milk or enjoying with various savoury or sweet toppings. Their signature dimpled oval shape is instantly recognisable to Aussies everywhere. Enjoy them as a me-time treat on a busy day or share them with the kids for a bit of afternoon fun. Milk Arrowroot plain biscuits have been beloved for generations for a reason and you will love them too. Start dunking and enjoy!
  • - Prefect for tea time and sharing

  • -No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

  • - Made in Australia

  • - Delicious plain sweet biscuit

  • - There is no substitute

long_description:
Arnott's Ginger Nut biscuits are plain biscuits with just a hint of sweetness and spice. These ginger biscuits, are the perfect treat for any time of day. They're baked exactly the way our Victorian locals love them with no artificial flavours or preservatives. With the delicious flavour of ginger melding with a crunchy biscuit, just one will not be enough. Share them with friends or dunk them in your evening cuppa for an extra sweet biscuit indulgence. Arnott's The Original Ginger Nut sweet biscuits will please everyone.
  • - Dark and crunchy ginger spiced biscuit

  • - Made with quality ingredients

  • - Dunkable

  • - No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

  • - Aussie made, Aussie loved

Perfect for play time or snack time alike, a pack of Arnott's Gluten Free Tiny Teddies Choc Chip biscuits is sure to excite even the biggest of kids. Now made gluten free, even more Aussies can enjoy a tasty treat. Your kids will love these choc chip tiny teddies for an afternoon snack or weekend treat. These Choc Chip Gluten Free Tiny Teddies come in a large share pouch, perfect for splitting at home to share with the family. With the richness of milk chocolate chips and the iconic taste of Tiny Teddies, these gluten free biscuits are family friendly deliciousness.
  • - Gluten free and suitable for gluten avoiders

  • - Choc chip flavour with real chocolate chips

  • - A family favourite - great for little fingers

  • - Made in Australia

  • - There is no substitute

long_description:
It's OREO with a twist! With it's delicious creme flavour inspired by CADBURY Creme Egg - with 2 x creme

compared to Original OREO cookies, double the YUM! Delightfully combining CADBURY Milk Chocolate

inspired OREO cookies with a doubled CADBURY Creme Egg inspired creme. The OREO sandwich cookies offers a

truly delicious taste sensation, unleashing your playful spirit. Twist, lick, and dunk to experience the ultimate OREO

moment or simply enjoy crushed over your favourite ice cream. The perfect snack for bonding with loved ones,

OREO Cookies also make an excellent coffee break companion. Add them to your favourite dessert recipes to

 wow family and friends or take them with you everywhere you go for the ultimate biscuit crowd-pleaser.

The perfect biscuit to join your Easter celebrations! Visit oreo.com.au for recipe inspiration.

  • CADBURY Creme Egg inspired flavoured sandwich cookies with doubled CADBURY Creme Egg inspired flavoured creme

  • OREO Double Stuff CADBURY Creme Egg inspired flavoured cookies, the perfect addition to your Easter Celebrations.

  • Made to be shared, OREO Cookies are perfect for snacking or enjoying as a treat for the whole family

  • Each pack of OREO Double Stuff sandwich biscuits inspired by Cadbury Caramilk 131g contains 11 cookies

  • Twist, lick, dunk! Enjoy OREO your way or with a glass of fresh milk

  • 2 x Creme compared to Original OREO cookies, double the YUM!.

Bringing the inspiration of New York to OREO New York Cheesecake flavoured cookies, 2 x creme compared to Original OREO cookies, double the YUM!.

Delightfully combining a Vanilla flavoured cookie with a doubled zesty Cheesecake flavoured creme. The OREO sandwich cookies offer a truly original taste sensation, unleashing your playful spirit. Twist, lick, and dunk to experience the ultimate OREO moment or simply enjoy with a glass of fresh milk.

The perfect snack for bonding with loved ones, OREO Cookies also make an excellent coffee break companion. Add them to your favorite dessert recipes to wow family and friends or take them with you everywhere you go for the ultimate crowd-pleaser.

Vist oreo.com.au for recipe inspiration
.
  • OREO New York Cheesecake, Vanilla Flavoured Cookie Sandwich with Doubled Zesty Cheesecake flavoured creme.

  • OREO Double Stuff New York Cheesecake flavoured cookies, the perfect addition to your favourite baking recipe.

  • Made to be shared, OREO Cookies are perfect for snacking or enjoying as a treat for the whole family

  • Each pack of OREO double stuff New York Cheesecake Cookies 131g contains 11 cookies

Arnott's Raspberry Shortcake biscuits are a must-have for any morning tea, whether you're catching up with friends and neighbours or in the mood for a sweet treat break. The melt-in-your-mouth combination is right at home on any saucer. For an extra-indulgent moment of me-time, enjoy by slowly nibbling your way through the soft, buttery shortcake biscuits until just the chewy, jammy centre remains.
  • - Soft, jammy and chewy biscuits

  • - A melt-in-your-mouth combination

  • - Plant-based sweet biscuits

  • - A burst of fruity flavour in every bite

  • - Elevate any snack occasion

long_description:
The original Arnott's Milk Coffee biscuit is the perfect plain biscuit for any time of day. These plain biscuits have the delicious flavour of gooey golden syrup with creamy milk. With delicately scalloped edges, Milk Coffee biscuits are an iconic part of Australian tea time. These sweet biscuits can be eaten straight from the pack or served alongside a hot chocolate in Winter. So whether it's a morning moment or a afternoon treat you're craving - these sweet golden biscuits are an excellent choice.
  • - A golden crunchy plain biscuit

  • - Mild delicious flavours of golden syrup and milk

  • - Dunkable

  • - No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

  • - No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

long_description:
Ladyfingers or "Savoiardi" take their name from the original region of Savoy which included the region of Sardinia in Italy.
Savoiardi originated in the late 15th century at the court of the Duchy of Savoy where they were created to mark the occasion of a visit by the King of France.
Today whilst ladyfingers are seen in many shapes and forms, Ital chooses to produce Savoiardi using the traditional recipe used by the master patisserie chefs of years gone by.

long_description:
Get ready to meet the most exciting biscuit to hit the scene—introducing OREO with a sour and zesty twist, inspired by SOUR PATCH KIDS Lime! This isn't your average cookie. With double the tangy, SOUR PATCH KIDS inspired creme, each bite brings a burst of sour sweetness that'll wake up your taste buds in the best way possible!
Twist, Lick, and Dunk to unleash the ultimate flavour adventure. Or, for an unexpected treat, crush them over some delicious sorbet for a sweet and sour sensation! Share these at your next BBQ, enjoy a few cookies for quick treat, or surprise your friends and family with a zesty dessert twist. Want to get even more creative? Try adding them to a milkshake or blending them into your favorite dessert for a truly playful masterpiece.
Whether you're diving into a movie marathon, grabbing a snack between meetings, or treating yourself after a long day, OREO inspired by SOUR PATCH KIDS is here to bring zing to every moment. Exciting, bold, and full of unexpected flavour—this is the snack that's going to change everything! Visit oreo.com.au for recipe inspiration.
  • SOUR PATCH KIDS inspired flavoured sandwich cookies with doubled SOUR PATCH KIDS inspired flavoured creme

  • OREO Double Stuff SOUR PATCH KIDS inspired flavoured cookies, the perfect addition to your movie night.

  • Made to be shared, OREO Cookies are perfect for snacking or enjoying as a treat for the whole family

  • Each pack of OREO Double Stuff sandwich biscuits inspired by SOUR PATCH KIDS 131g contains 11 cookies

  • Twist, lick, dunk! Enjoy OREO your way!

  • 2 x creme compared to Original OREO cookies, double the YUM!.

Find your moment of indulgence with Arnott's Gluten Free Tim Tams. A perfect chocolate treat for those seeking gluten-free options without missing out on the iconic taste of Tim Tam Original chocolate biscuits. These biscuits feature the classic Tim Tam Original combination of irresistible real chocolate, smooth cream filling and crisp chocolate biscuit, all made with gluten free ingredients. Gluten free Tim Tams are the perfect way to indulge in the afternoon or unwind at the end of a long day. Perfect for sharing with friends or enjoying as a personal treat, you can now enjoy Tim Tams while catering to your gluten free diet needs.
  • - Australia's most-loved chocolate biscuits

  • - Made with irresistible real chocolate

  • - For your moment of afternoon indulgence

  • - Perfect gluten free chocolate biscuits for sharing with loved ones

  • - Ideal snack for parties and gatherings

long_description:
Arnott's Monte Carlo cream is the perfect morning treat to share with a pot of tea as you catch up with friends - or for when you're feeling peckish. Named after the glamourous seaside city, the flavour of a Monte Carlo cream-filled biscuit will transport you to deliciousness. This Aussie favourite cream biscuit is made for those me-time moments when all you need to do is relax and unwind. With a simple twist and split, flavours of sweet coconut, honey, vanilla and jam await. Treat yourself to a spot by the Mediterranean with a Monte Carlo.
  • - Arnott's most iconic cream biscuit

  • - Ready to twist and split

  • - Made in Australia

  • - Flavours of coconut, honey, vanilla and jam

  • - Perfect for tea time

long_description:
Turn any morning into a special occasion with Arnott's Shortbread Cream biscuits. Dunkable and perfectly sweet, these shortbread biscuits make the perfect companion to tea, coffee and good company. Made with a traditional recipe, Shortbread Cream biscuits are the perfect choice for high-quality snacking any time you need an indulgent treat or a little me-time. Simply delicious, these sweet biscuits are one of life's simple pleasures.
  • - Perfectly sweet and buttery shortbread flavour

  • - Baked biscuits using a traditional recipe

  • - Shortbread biscuits made to be dunked

  • - Sweet biscuits made without artificial colours and preservatives

  • - Sweet biscuits suitable for any occasion, from casual snacking to serving at social gatherings

long_description:
Olina's Bakehouse brings friends, family, and flavours together with delicious artisan biscuits. Spark lively conversation with creative flavour combinations by making our range of artisan style cookies a delicious afternoon treat, or the centrepiece for your next gathering.

Packed with rich, smooth choc chips and baked to perfection, Olina's Bakehouse Choc Chip Mini Cookies offer a delightful crunch and melt-in-your mouth indulgence. Perfect for a delicious treat with your favourite tea or coffee, or for long lunches, BBQ's, birthday celebrations, festive entertaining, christmas, new years, easter, spring carnival or casual get togethers with family and friends any time of the year.
  • New and Improved Recipe

  • Made with Real Butter

  • Deliciously Moreish Mini Cookies

  • Made in Australia

A vibrant twist on your snack time, with these cream-filled biscuits that bring together the perfect harmony of zesty orange-flavoured cream and two crisp, golden biscuits. Each bite gives you that refreshing burst of citrus flavour, paired with a satisfying crunch. Made and loved in Australia, Arnott's Orange Slice biscuits are ready to be savoured alone or shared with others alongside a cup of tea.
  • - Ideal combination of crisp and creamy

  • - A cheerful cream-filled biscuit treat

  • - Perfect cream-filled biscuits to share with family and friends

  • - Turns your snack time into a refreshing escape

  • - Pairs wonderfully with a hot beverage

We believe that a little indulgence can bring a lot of joy.
Thats why were dedicated to crafting moreish gluten free snacks for everyone to enjoy.
To this day, our recipes are created by our family, then expertly prepared in our bakery for you to devour.
These Lemon Cream Melting Moments are crafted with a luscious lemon flavoured cream sandwiched between two melt in your mouth biscuits.
Can you stop at one?
Everyone deserves deliciousness.

  • Family Owned
  • Gluten Free
  • Wheat Free
  • Fodmap Friendly
  • Fructose Friendly
  • Dairy Free
  • No Artificial Colours, No Artificial Flavours, No Artificial Preservatives
  • GMO Free

Perfect for playtime or snack time, Arnott's Tiny Teddy Chocolate Biscuits are the ideal surprise treat for kids and adults alike. This multipack features 8 perfectly portioned packs of rich cocoa-flavoured Tiny Teddies, making them just the right size for a sweet snack. Whether it's for school snacks, lunchboxes, or an afternoon pick-me-up, these chocolatey biscuits & cookies are a hit with the whole family.

With their irresistible chocolate flavour and adorable Tiny Teddies shape, these biscuits are a fun and convenient multipack option for on-the-go snacks or a delightful treat any time of day. Stock up and share the joy of Tiny Teddies!
 
  • - 8 convenient individual packs of Tiny Teddies

  • - A family favourite

  • - No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

  • - Made in Australia

  • - There is no substitute

long_description:
OREO Mini Sandwich Biscuits inspired by Cadbury Caramilk are the same OREO cookies you know and love, just mini.

Delightfully combining sweet OREO biscuits with a delicious Cadbury Caramilk inspired creme. OREO mini's inspired by Cadbury Caramilk are the perfect on the go snack! These mini sweet cream munchable biscuits are the perfect size for sharing with family and friends. Whether you need sweet biscuits for baking ingredients, ice cream decorations or delicious birthday party treats - OREO Minis are the perfect snack to share. TWIST, LICK, DUNK in a glass of milk, or enjoy with your cup of tea or coffee - OREO Mini's are the playful biscuit to pair with your drink of choice!
  • OREO Mini Sandwich Biscuits inspired by Cadbury Caramilk, 10 pack 204g

  • Muchable OREO cookies with a smooth Cadbury Caramilk inspired crme

  • Each 204g box of OREO Minis contains 10 portion packs of delcious sweet biscuits.

  • Elevate your baking by decorating your favourite desserts with these miniature OREO Cookies

  • These playful mini OREO biscuits are the perfect solution for snacking at home, in the office, or on the go

  • Enjoy the taste of OREO Mini cookies with your favorite person or serve them at your next party or social gathering.

long_description:
A 'tip-tap, tip-tap' sound came from the roof of their house. The Teddies looked out the window to see a huge rainbow raining down Hundreds & Thousands! Arnott's Tiny Teddy Hundreds & Thousands Biscuits bring this fun, colourful story to life in every bite. Perfect for playtime or snack time, this multipack includes 8 perfectly portioned packs of sweet biscuits, made with no artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives.

Whether it's for school snacks, lunchboxes, or an afternoon treat, these Tiny Teddies are a hit with kids and adults alike. The fun and colourful Hundreds & Thousands flavour makes these biscuits & cookies a joyful snack any time of day. Stock up on this multipack and share the magic of Tiny Teddies!
  • - 8 convenient individual packs of Tiny Teddy Hundreds & Thousands biscuits

  • - No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

  • - In a handy recyclable carton

  • - Made in Australia

  • - There is no substitute

OREO Mini Sandwich Biscuits inspired by Pascall Marshmallows are the same OREO cookies you know and love, just mini.


Delightfully combining delicious pink OREO biscuits with a delicious Pascall Marshmallow inspired creme. OREO mini's inspired by Pascall Marshmallows are the perfect on the go snack! These mini sweet creme munchable biscuits are the perfect size for sharing with family and friends. Whether you need sweet biscuits for baking ingredients, ice cream decorations or delicious birthday party treats - OREO Minis are the perfect snack to share. Enjoy with your cup of tea, coffee or glass of milk - OREO Mini's are the playful biscuit to pair with your drink of choice!
  • OREO Mini Sandwich Biscuits inspired by Pascall Marshmallows, 10 pack 204g

  • Munchable pink OREO cookies with a smooth Pascall Marshmallow inspired creme

  • Each 204g box of OREO Minis contains 10 portion packs of delcious sweet biscuits.

  • Elevate your baking by decorating your favourite desserts with these miniature OREO Cookies

  • These playful mini OREO biscuits are the perfect solution for snacking at home, in the office, or on the go

  • Enjoy the taste of OREO Mini cookies with your favorite person or serve them at your next party or social gathering.

Wackadoo! Bluey and Bingo are here to make your kid's school snack even more fun and delicious. These honey and oat biscuits are the perfect balance of sweet honey flavour with the crisp crunch of an oat biscuit, perfect for a lunchbox addition or for on-the-go! With no artificial colours, no artificial flavours or no artificial preservatives, these kids snacks are as magic as the Magic Xylophone. Available in a multi pack of 8 individual portions, the whole gang is invited to snack - Bandit, Chilli, Bluey, Bingo and even Muffin! With an impressive Health Star Rating (HSR) of 4, these nutritious Bluey snacks have been cleverly crafted to be equal parts tasty, wholesome, and fun. These Bluey biscuits will make you and your kids as happy as a game of Keepy Uppy!
  • - Contains 8 snack packs of Bluey Honey & Oat biscuits

  • - All the wackadoo fun of an episode of Bluey in biscuit form!

  • - Bluey Pairs Game on the pack

  • - Perfect as lunchbox snacks

  • - Impressive Health Star Rating (HSR) of 4 & no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

long_description:
Whether you're taking a quick break from a demanding workday, seeking an energy boost between meetings, or simply desire a quality chocolate treat during your personal downtime, Kinder Tronky is geared for your lifestyle. Its individual packaging ensures freshness and portability, making it an ideal companion for the office, travel, or a quiet moment at home.

Elevate your snacking experience with a chocolate biscuit bar that's handy for all

Kinder Tronky provides the sweet treat you seek, without disrupting your busy routine. It's enclosed in a rich chocolate layer, perfectly balanced by a smooth, milky filling infused with delicate biscuit crumbs. A harmonious blend of textures and sophisticated flavour profiles that ensures a truly enjoyable and convenient snack.

  • Perfect for Snacking: Kinder Tronky is your ideal companion for a busy workday. It's a sophisticated biscuit snack that delivers a satisfying chocolate and wafer experience, perfect for that quick, quality break.

  • Flavour & Texture Harmony: Experience a unique blend of tastes and sensations in every Kinder Tronky choc biscuit bar; the crisp cocoa wafer provides a satisfying crunch, perfectly complemented by a rich chocolate layer and a smooth, milky filling interspersed with delightful biscuit crumbs, delivering a multi-sensory snacking experience.

  • Convenient & Portable Indulgence: Designed for your on-the-go lifestyle, Kinder Tronky is a portable snack. Slip this delightful choc into your bag or keep it in your desk for a ready-to-enjoy treat whenever the craving for a quality chocolate biscuit arises.

Enjoy your NUTELLA Hazelnut Chocolate spread in a crunchy wafer shell!
- Love NUTELLA in a jar? Here it is, in a bar! NUTELLA B-ready is a crunchy wafer biscuit baked to perfection filled with delicious NUTELLA and sprinkled with puffed wheat crispies. The perfect sweet snack to bring a smile to your in between meals breaks, office breaks or when travelling on-the-go.
- Individually wrapped and available in a multipack of 6 snack bars for you to share. A delicious alternative to museli bars, cookies & other snack & small biscuit bars, Nutella B-ready is the perfect biscuit accompaniment to your tea or coffee.
Find Nutella B-ready in the Biscuits aisle in-stores

The Good Stuff:

  • Gluten free
  • Suitable for vegetarians
  • Made from wholegrain rice
  • Fructose friendly
  • Only 67 calories per snack pack
  • Lunchbox friendly and perfect on the go
  • Made in Australia

Crisp and light, Table Of Plenty Mini Rice Cakes Milk Chocolate Topped Snack Pack combines crunchy wholegrain rice with creamy milk chocolate in easy, ready-to-go packs. Made in Australia, these mini snack packs are designed for convenience, making them a simple way to enjoy a lighter treat at school, after play, or while out and about.


At only 67 calories per pack, they are the ideal gluten free option for kids snacks, school lunches, or to keep handy for on-the-go moments. Fructose friendly and suitable for vegetarians, these mini rice cakes deliver the perfect balance of crunch and chocolate sweetness, appealing to both kids and adults. A lighter twist on traditional biscuits and crackers, they are a versatile snack the whole family can enjoy.

A little indulgence with a lot of wholegrain goodness. Table of Plenty Milk Chocolate Mini Rice Cakes Snack Pack makes snacking simple, tasty and convenient.

description: KETTLE POTATO CHIPS MULTIPACK SEA SALT 5PACK
ingredients: Potatoes, Sunflower and/or Canola Oil, Sea Salt.
long_description: At Kettle, we're passionate about creating great tasting chips. We use only the best Australian potatoes, slow cooked the unique Kettle way and deliciously seasoned with the finest all-natural ingredients. For our Kettle Original Sea Salt chips, we keep it simple. Just a touch of salt from the salt farms of South Australia. Nothing fancy, because sometimes it doesn't need to be. Kettle Chips are proudly Australian Made & Gluten Free. Our Sea Salt Potato Chips are Vegan Friendly* and 100% Natural. Now in a convenient pack of five ready for the lunch-box! *We don't use any animal products in the preparation of these chips. long_description:
Wholegrain Snacks Made to Be Wholesome
The bite-sized, crunchy wholegrain snacks of Sunbites Grainwaves Chips Multipack of 8 Sour Cream & Chives 176g are a wholesome treat you can always look forward to. When you stock up on these sour cream and chives chips, not only do you get to taste a brilliant flavour combo, but you also get to enjoy the unique crunch of Grainwaves curvy chips. We fuel the good in ourselves by choosing wholesome snacks.

No Added Surprises
Sunbites Grainwaves prides itself on not hiding any hidden nasties in our wholegrain chips. Every chip is Australian-made to be as natural as possible. This means that not only are Sunbites chips suitable for vegetarians, but there are also no artificial flavours, no artificial colour, and no artificial preservatives.

Platter Up to Not Strike Out at Snack Time
The 8 portions of this multipack means it's easy to share around the delightful taste of sour cream and chives chips. Make them your home's go-to lunchbox snacks during the week, or as a convenient option when on the go. You can even save up the entirety of the multipack chips to platter up the next time you have friends over. After all, it's hard to resist any snack when it's served up so nicely.

Now available in an 8 pack box - easy to store in your pantry and recycle in your kerbside bin!
  • A multipack that is ready to go wherever, whether that's on workbreak, as an afternoon snack on-the-go, or on an outdoor adventure.

long_description:
Change Up Life's Expectations
Twisties Corn Rice Snacks Mulitpack of 8 Cheese 152g takes your tastebuds in a whole new and unexpected direction with each bite. Life's pretty straight without Twisties, so try incorporating these cheese snacks into your day to change things up. Expect the unexpected when you pop open a pack of Twisties Cheese.

Pump Up the Party
Invigorate any party's atmosphere when you bring along these multipack snacks. Our cheese snack may be exactly what your parties have been missing. With a twist of cheesy delight and the crunch of uniquely shaped snacks, the party is sure to start pumping. Let your friends and family experience a new level of fun with Australian-made snacking.

Don't Get Snack Time Twisted
Don't get it twisted, cheese snacks aren't a new invention. However, Twisties Cheese takes the nostalgia of crunching into one and makes it exciting with an iconic shape you won't forget. Whether you're looking for lunch snacks to brighten up road trips, or something to portion out when the afternoon rolls around, Twisties has you covered.

Now available in an 8 pack box - easy to store in your pantry and recycle in your kerbside bin!
  • Aussie proud to be providing Australians with the everyday or party snacks they deserve.

long_description:
Proud Aussie Favourite

Smith's has been a part of Australian snacking since 1931, offering the original crinkle-cut chip made from 100% Australian potatoes. It's a flavour combination that's stood the test of time.

Shared Enjoyment Across Generations

From backyard catch-ups and watching the footy to relaxed evenings, Smith's brings people together with flavours everyone recognises and enjoys.

Portions Made Easy

With 8 lunchbox snacks in every pack, these gluten-free chips are great for popping into a lunchbox or enjoying as a convenient serve when you're on the go with family or friends.
  • Distinct salt & vinegar flavour.

  • Original crinkle-cut texture for a satisfying crunch.

  • Convenient portions for the family's lunchboxes or on-the-go snacking.

  • Made with 100% Australian potatoes.

  • A gluten-free snack that everyone can enjoy.

long_description:
Delicious Bites That Belong On A Grazing Platter
Preparing for your upcoming cheese platter? Look no further than Red Rock Deli Honey Soy Chicken Chips to add that extra touch of gourmet delight. These premium potato crisps offer an irresistible crunch that will enchant the senses of all who partake. So, take your platter to new heights and delight in the unmatched savoury and succulent flair that only Red Rock Deli Potato Chips can provide. Impress, indulge, and savour every moment with the generous entertaining size of this multipack today.

Premium Bites Ready To Serve At Dinner Parties
Impress your guests with Red Rock Deli Potato Chips at your next dinner party! Our chips are the perfect choice for those who demand the very best in sophistication and flavour. With its crunchy texture and mouth-watering flavours, Red Rock Deli is sure to be a crowd-pleaser at any gathering. Better yet, our perfectly portioned potato chips multipack make it easier to distribute to all guests. Try our chips today and see for yourself why Red Rock Deli Chips are the perfect addition to any dinner party!

Finest Ingredients You Can Taste In Every Crunch
At Red Rock Deli, we believe that the perfect snack starts with the finest quality ingredients, and our Honey Soy and Chicken Potato Chips are no exception. Made with premium potatoes and a deliciously sweet and savoury seasoning, every bite is sure to satisfy your snack cravings. Whether you looking to satisfy your snacking cravings, or add something new to the lunchbox, this 5 pack is always ready to be devoured.

  • Seasoned with the harmonious combination of honey, savoury chicken and subtly rich soy sauce to satisfy your snacking cravings.

  • Premium potato chips multipack worthy of any cheese platter, provided in a generous entertaining size of a 5 pack.

  • Our potato chips are gluten-free and delicious with every bite.

  • Impress those who demand the best in flavours and texture with Red Rock Deli Chips.

  • Made in Australia with only the finest ingredients that will elevate any lunchbox or casual snacking session.

Quality You Can Trust
With a proud gluten-free recipe and our classic crunch, Smith's Crinkle Cut Cheese & Onion Chips deliver the flavour you expect. Plus, with a Health Star Rating of 3.5, these chips provide a healthier option compared to snacks with a lower HSR.

Made for Everyday Enjoyment
Portion-sized for convenience, these multipacks are easy to slip into a lunchbox or enjoy at home. They provide a familiar cheese and onion taste that the whole family loves.

For Moments Worth Sharing
From laid-back weekend gatherings to casual afternoon breaks, each individually wrapped serve is gluten-free and perfectly portioned for snacking or adding to the family's lunchboxes.
  • Rich cheese and onion flavour for a timeless snacking experience.

  • Crinkle cut and perfectly crunchy.

  • 8 individual servings, perfect for back to school and lunchbox snacks.

  • Gluten-free and made with 100% Australian potatoes.

  • With a 3.5 Health Star Rating, this is a healthier choice than chips with a lower rating.

long_description:
Smoky Aussie Barbecue tang meets a light, crunchy veggie ring—54% veggie goodness with 30% less fat than chips.

• 72 calories per cup for guilt-free snacking
• 30% less fat than regular potato chips
• Made with 100% Aussie yellow split peas for plant-powered protein
• Baked, never fried, for a light & crispy crunch
• Vegan friendly, with no artificial colours or flavours
• Proudly Australian-made & family-owned

Ready to level up your snack game? Infuzions® Veggie Rings Aussie Barbecue bring you a deliciously crunchy, better-for-you ring, made from 100% Aussie yellow split peas - air-baked to perfection. Seasoned with our signature tangy Aussie Barbecue blend and herbs, each cup serves up 72 calories and 30% less fat than standard potato chips. With 54% veggie content and no artificial nasties, these rings pack a punch of plant-powered goodness to keep you happy and satisfied. Tuck them into lunch boxes, road trips or afternoon snack breaks and enjoy Healthy, Tasty, Happy snacking, Aussie-style.

Packed with Flavour
Cheetos Corn Puffs Multipack of 8 Cheese 96g offers 8 conveniently-sized snacks packs to share around. Each puff serving is practically bursting from the sheer amount of Cheetos' iconic cheesy flavour packed into it. When the usual cheese chips need a flavour and texture boost, think of Cheetos.

Guest with the Best
Bring your A-Game to any party, movie night or social gathering with Cheetos Corn Puffs Multipack of 8 Cheese 96g. Whether you're dipping into a packet before a fun party or munching through a movie, let the much-loved cheesy snack do the talking. You'll be the host with the most-or the guest who brought the best! Divvy out those cheese snacks (made with real cheese!) and put your feet up.

The Perfect Addition To Any Activity
With 8 packets to multipack, Cheetos Corn Puffs are the perfect companion for any outdoor activity. Whether you're stopping to smell the roses on a hike, settling in for a garden picnic or at the beach with friends, Cheetos corn puffs are the conveniently sized cheese snack for when you're on the go. Made with real cheese, you can taste the magic.

Now available in an 8 pack box - easy to store in your pantry and recycle in your kerbside bin!
  • Bursting with flavour, our Cheetos Cheese Puffs pack any lunchbox with a punch.

long_description:
Revamp Your Roadtrip
Looking for the perfect snack for the road? Share the love with our Cheetos Cheese & Bacon Balls multipack. Enjoy bite-sized cheese balls full of finger-licking and lip-smacking delight while you're on the go. With 8 in a pack, there's enough of the golden cheese puffs for everyone.

Pop Open the Party Favourites
Wow your next party with the fan-favourite cheesy snack. Cheetos Cheese & Bacon balls promise an irresistible flavour combo of smokiness and rich creaminess, followed by iconic texture crispiness. When you're passing these delightfully cheesy snacks around, everyone will find it difficult to resist. Pop open a pack to celebrate the festivities and savour the Cheetos crunch, they're sure to hit the spot!

Tasty Treats For Afternoon Hours
They say great things come in small packages. Our multipack of delicious Cheese & Bacon balls is conveniently packed with flavour-bursting puffs of moreish delights. Creamy, savoury and smokey, they're the perfect addition to snack time after the day's complete, no matter your age.

Now available in an 8 pack box - easy to store in your pantry and recycle in your kerbside bin!
  • Portioned packages for the afternoon snack.

The Original Crinkle-Cut Chip

Smith's has been delivering the classic crunch Australians know and love for generations. Proudly made with 100% Australian potatoes, each crinkle-cut chip is peeled and sliced for the perfect crunch.

Loved Across Australia

This variety mix brings together favourite flavours that have been part of Aussie gatherings for decades. It's a go-to choice for fans who enjoy a selection of tastes in one pack.

Conveniently Portioned

With 20 lunchbox-sized packs, this multipack of gluten-free potato chips is great for sharing in family settings or group events. Whether you're hosting friends or heading outdoors, there's a flavour for everyone in this lunchbox-ready selection.
  • A variety of flavours to suit every taste.

  • Crinkle cut for the ultimate flavour and crunch.

  • Great for lunchboxes, work breaks, and snacking on the go.

  • An Aussie pantry staple made with Australian potatoes.

  • 20 portion-controlled packs of gluten-free potato chips.

long_description:
Platter Worthy Perfection Made from Australian Ingredients
Our potato chips are proudly Australian-made, beginning with the finest potatoes harvested from Australian farms to eventually being delivered to your doorstep. After peeling, our natural potatoes are roughly cut and slowly cooked in 100% sunflower oil for the most delectable crunch.

Suitable for both a Dinner Party or Quick Lunch Snack
Taking inspiration from the food deli, our Red Rock Deli Variety Pack of signature potato chips are sure to please even the fussiest of foodies. Each of our Red Rock Deli chips flavours are just the snack you need wherever you are on the go. Whether it's outdoors at a picnic or indoors for a dinner at home with family watching your favourite cooking shows, Red Rock Deli is ready to be the chips you love.

There's a Little Something for Everyone
Our Red Rock Deli multipack has all your favourite Red Rock Deli flavours, making it the perfect choice to satisfy everyone's snack cravings. Next time you hit the road on a trip of a lifetime, or are setting up for a day watching the footy finals, make sure to bring along our multipack to keep everyone satisfied and hunger at bay.

- 3 x Honey Soy Chicken potato chips - a blend combining the sweetness of honey cut by the subtle richness of soy sauce and chicken seasoning
- 3 x Sweet Chilli and Sour Cream potato chips - flavoured with the sweet heat of chilli and paprika combined with just the right amount of smooth tangy sour cream
- 2 x Sea Salt and Balsamic Vinegar potato chips - fresh sea salt is mixed with a splash of sweet and sharp balsamic vinegar
- 2 x Sea Salt potato chips - seasoned with a fresh grinding of Australian sea salt to enrich the natural potato taste
  • Made in Australia with produce straight from local farms, making Red Rock Deli's chips the choice for True Blues.

  • Made with all natural colours and flavours.

  • Gluten-free natural and better for you potato chips.

  • Each chips' package is a portion-sized treat for a snack on the go.

  • Crowd-pleasing crisps to keep everybody satisfied, no matter the occasion.
name: Potato Chips Lunchbox Snacks Multipack Assorted 10 Pack

long_description:
Mini in Size, Mighty in Snackability
Parkers Baked Pretzel Minis Multipack of 8 Salted 200g may be bite-sized snacks, but they are hardly mini when it comes to snack satisfaction. Each pack of baked pretzels offers a delightful exploration of the senses. Coated lightly with salt, biting into this baked snack brings a satisfying crunch to your day. When you need a mini salty snack to tide you over, reach for one of these mighty multipacks.

Ready to Go When You Are
If it's a convenient snack for on the go you're looking for, then these salty pretzels are your answer. With 8 portions in this multipack, everyone can enjoy a taste of what Parkers pretzels have to offer. No matter if you're looking to embark on an all-day outdoor activity, or need a new addition to your workbreak lunchbox, these mini pretzels are always ready.

Wholesome Fun For All
When it comes to wholesome snacks, Parkers pretzels are a permissible treat all can enjoy when snack time comes around. Each mini pretzel is low in saturated fat and contains no added MSG, making them an easy choice to add to your family's pantry. With 8 portions to spread out in the multipack, everyone can get their hands on this baked snack. However, they better move quickly before the pack is gone!

Now available in an 8 pack box - easy to store in your pantry and recycle in your kerbside bin!
  • A wholesome snack anyone would be overjoyed to find in their lunchbox with a 3.5 health star rating.

long_description:
Elevate Your Platter Game
Red Rock Deli Sweet Chilli & Sour Cream Potato Chips will add the perfect touch of excitement and flair to your next cheese platter. Our gourmet chips infuse just the right amount of heat with the subtle richness of sour cream to complement any spread. So spice up your platter game today to experience a flavourful journey that only Red Rock Deli can provide!

Entertain In Style With Perfectly Portioned Bites
Entertain and satisfy snacking taste buds with Red Rock Deli Sweet Chilli & Sour Cream Chips. Whether you're entertaining at home, packing a lunchbox, or enjoying a picnic with friends, our perfectly portioned multipack make for ideal snacks to share around to spice up any occasion. So why not indulge in some Red Rock Deli Chips today and take your snacking selection to the next level?

Experience True Quality With Every Crunch
At Red Rock Deli, we ensure that our gourmet crisps are crafted with a passion for excellence to deliver an unparalleled snacking experience. Our commitment to using the finest potatoes and ingredients is what sets us apart, making every chip a harmonious fusion of taste and texture that will tantalise your taste buds with every bite. So embark on a delicious flavour journey and try Red Rock Deli Chips today!
  • Seasoned with the warmth of chilli and the creamy goodness of sour cream to create a truly indulgent snacking experience, conveniently spread into a 5 pack multipack.

  • Red Rock Deli Potato Chips are perfect for any occasion that demands the very best in taste, whether it is a simple lunchbox or a decadent cheese platter.

  • Gluten-free crisps for anyone and everyone to indulge in.

  • Our potato chips multipack provides the perfect portions to kick those midday cravings at your work desk.

  • Made in Australia using the finest ingredients.

Aussie Pantry Icons

As an Aussie pantry staple since 1931, Smith's delivers the classic crunch you know and love, now paired with Grain Waves, packed with 65% wholegrain. Both are proudly made with quality Australian ingredients.

Snacks That Bring People Together

Loved by Aussie families for generations, Smith's snacks are made to bring people together. Whether you're loyal to the original crinkle-cut or a fan of golden wholegrain waves, this mix celebrates two much-loved favourites.

Portioned For Family Moments

Designed for sharing in family settings, these 20 individually wrapped packs offer convenient portion sizes perfect for lunchboxes or group snacking. With a 3.5 Health Star Rating, they're a healthier choice compared to chips with a lower HSR.
  • A mix of Smith's classic crunch and Grain Waves wholegrain taste.

  • Great for back-to-school and lunchboxes.

long_description:
Four Big Brands in One Box

Smith's, Grain Waves, Doritos, and Twisties: each brings its own unique style to this pack. Proudly made with quality ingredients, this mix delivers the crunch and taste Aussies know and love.


Snacks with Aussie Spirit

Whether you're loyal to crinkle-cut, love the wholegrain texture of Grain Waves, or enjoy the cheesy hit of Doritos and Twisties, this is a mix that works from a picnic with pals to watching the footy finals.

Easy Portions for Every Occasion

With 20 lunchbox snacks inside, this variety pack is perfect for popping into a lunchbox or sharing at group events. Bring a mix of flavours to family gatherings, outings, or casual hangouts.
  • An exciting mix of flavours for every taste.

  • Four snack favourites in one pack.

  • Great for sharing, on-the-go snacking and lunchbox prepping.

  • Proudly made in Australia.

  • Portion-controlled packs for sensible snacking.
name: Snack Chips Mix Lunchbox Snacks Multipack Assorted 20 Pack

long_description: Discover the ultimate snack with Cobs Popcorn Variety Mix???a delicious assortment of natural popcorn flavours that everyone in the family will love! Perfectly portioned for convenience, these gluten-free, nut-free snack packs are ideal for school lunches, lunchboxes, after-school snacks, road trips, picnics or a quick afternoon pick-me-up. Made with all-natural ingredients and free from artificial colours, flavours, and preservatives, Cobs Popcorn delivers guilt-free snacking without compromising on taste. Choose from irresistible flavours like Sea Salt, Cheddar Cheese, Best Ever Butter, and Lightly Salted Slightly Sweet???there's something to satisfy every craving. The perfect choice for health-conscious snackers and busy families on the go!

long_description:
Twisties Never Chickens Out at Snack Time
Twisties Chicken Snacks Mulitpack of 8 Chicken 152g embodies flavour boldness with the rich taste of chicken in every snack pack. Your tastebuds are sure to dance in delight when you pop open a multipack, but don't keep the snacking fun to yourself. The 8 pack is the perfect thing to bring anywhere when you don't know what works for everyone. A guaranteed crowd-pleaser, you'll nail snack time every time.

Australian-made for Aussie Adventures
Whether you're passing around the multipack on an outdoor walk, sitting by the beach or watching live sport, these Twisties snacks are the ideal on-the-go snack for any Aussie adventure. Pre-portioned and portable, you can pop one in your bag or in the car for your next trip.

Twist and Shout Every Holiday
Even the best home-baked goods will struggle to compete with the festive delight of Twisties. The multipack of 8 will go down a treat with the whole family. Packaged in a square box, the Twisties Chicken pack can be easily transported when the party isn't at your home. Bring the joy of Twisties everywhere the celebration is happening.

Now available in an 8 pack box - easy to store in your pantry and recycle in your kerbside bin!
  • Suprise and delight the family at any special occasion with our Twisties multipack of 8 Chicken.

long_description:
Four Aussie Classics in One Fun-Filled Multipack

Smith's potato chips have been part of Australian life since 1931, delivering the classic crunch Australians know and love. Paired with the cheesy flavour of Twisties and the zesty bite of Burger Rings, this is a collection of true Aussie favourites.

Snacks for Every Taste

Bringing together four well-loved snacks, this variety pack caters to everyone in the family. It's a mix that appeals to long-time fans and those who enjoy trying different flavours.

Ready for Any Occasion

With 20 lunchbox snacks inside, this Fun Mix makes it easy to pack variety into lunchboxes or share at casual gatherings. Each pack is portioned for convenience and enjoyment.
  • An exciting combination of four Aussie snack favourites.

  • A range of tasty choices the whole family can enjoy.

  • Perfectly portioned for adding to lunchboxes or keeping in the cupboard when hunger strikes!

  • Made in Australia for a homegrown taste experience.

  • Portioned packs for sensible snacking.

Smith's Thinly Cut Potato Chips Share Pack Sweet Chili & Sour Cream 175g are made from only the finest Australian-grown potatoes. They're simply peeled, sliced thinly, and cooked to perfection for a light, crispy texture. They're then sprinkled with our famous tangy, sweet chilli & sour cream seasoning to provide a subtle mouthfeel with maximum flavour while snacking.

Snacking Made Simple
Smith's potato chips are the perfect size at 175g for the whole family to enjoy for snacking, or to bolster the mood when passed around at your next party. What's more, they contain no artificial flavours, colours or preservatives, meaning you can feel confident about serving up a classic Aussie favourite to your guests. But wait! It gets better! These mouthwatering, thinly cut potato chips may be packed with flavour, but they're also gluten-free!

Perfect for Every Special Occasion and Anything in Between
Whether you're entertaining friends on Footy Finals night, bringing along a treat to the next outdoor family gathering, or even setting off on a road trip for the holidays, these potato chips will never fail to satisfy. They may taste special, but that doesn't mean they need to be reserved for special occasions. Divvy them up as school lunch snacks or weave them into your work break for a delicious mid-arvo flavour kick. For the moment you're in the mood for a snack, think of Smith's chips.
  • Sweet chili spice meets creamy sour cream in a light, crispy thin cut chip.

  • Thin cut for a delicate crunch and full-on Smith's flavour.

  • Great for entertaining, snacking on the couch or sharing with mates.

  • Made in Australia using locally grown potatoes.

  • No artificial flavours and gluten free - snack without compromise.
