long_description:
Gather Up the Good Times
Make every gathering unforgettable, no matter the occasion, with Red Rock Deli Sweet Chilli & Sour Cream Potato Chips. Whether it's a movie night, a fancy dinner party, or a casual get-together, these Red Rock Deli chips elevate the snacking experience to a whole new level of class. The bold flavour profile and premium quality of the spicy potato chips make them the ideal companion for a festive spread that captivates taste buds and brings people together for the good times.

Spicy Interruption for Your Work Break
Turn your work break into a sensationally spicy interruption with these deli chips. Packed with a kick of chilli heat and the creamy coolness of sour cream, these premium potato chips provide an escape from the mundane daily life through a flavourful work break. This 290g share pack of spicy potato chips is the perfect size to bring the whole workplace together!

Best Match-Up for Drinks with Foodie Friends
Elevate a casual drinks with friends session with a new addition to the cheese platter. Those friends who are avid foodies are going to adore the complex flavours of sweet chilli and sour cream, especially in how they match-up nicely with their drinks of choice. Whether you're keeping things casual or are looking to create a more formal gathering, ensure your snacking experience is as refined and delightful as the company you keep with Red Rock Deli chips.
  • Premium quality potatoes and flavours are always the focus of Red Rock Deli chips, and our sweet chilli and sour cream selection is no different.

  • The 290g share pack makes it the perfect snacking choice to pass or plate up on a cheese platter for any gathering.

  • Enhance the joy of your work break by enjoying some spicy potato chips that do more than feed your curiosity.

  • Friends and foodies alike will adore the entertainment this party bag brings to their taste buds.

long_description:
Light Yet Flavourful Snack For Any Occasion
Our Smith's Thinly Cut Potato Chips Share Pack Original 175g are the perfect size to bring along to your next gathering with friends. They suit any snacking occasion, whether it's on a road trip or to pass around at the next Footy Finals viewing. The fun, light and crispy texture of the gluten-free chips make them universally loved potato snacks by Australians of all ages!

Snack Time Has Never Been So Reliable
At Smith's, we pride ourselves in creating snacking options that are always ready to stock up the pantry or brighten up the party scene. Our light potato chips contain no artificial flavours, colours or preservatives, but are dusted with just the right amount of salt to get you salivating. If you're seeking out a snack that reliably tickles the tastebuds, thinly cut crisps are the way to go!

Australian Made with Love and Care
Since 1931, Smith's potato chips have been made exclusively in Australia. Smith's unwavering devotion to quality and taste is why we've become a celebrated Aussie pantry staple that's perfect for all occasions. Don't hesitate to pop open a pack next time you feel the snacking urges hit.
  • Smith's Thinly Cut Potato Chips Share Pack Original 175g are lightly salted and delicately crisp with a clean, classic potato flavour.

  • Thinly cut and cooked for a refined crunch and satisfying simplicity.

  • Thinly cut potato chips perfect for platters, lunchboxes or snacking on at any occasion.

  • Made in Australia using locally grown potatoes.

  • No added MSG, and free from artificial flavours, colours and preservatives.

long_description:
Share The Love,
Bring people together and share the love with Smith's Salt and Vinegar Potato Chips in our 380g pack! Whether you're hosting a Halloween-themed party or a family Christmas gathering, Smith's chips are the perfect snack for unforgettable enjoyment. We made sure that there's plenty to go around with our party-sized pack, so everyone can experience the ultimate tangy, lip-smacking flavour. What's more, they're even gluten-free and suitable for vegetarians too!

Start Your Adventure With Smith's
When you're looking for a snack to start off your next road trip or outdoor activities, turn to Smith's Salt and Vinegar Potato Chips. The flavour combo of tangy, savoury goodness will keep everyone's snack cravings at bay and tastebuds satisfied. Better yet, you won't have to worry about prying hands either as there's plenty to go around. So crack open a party bag on your next adventure and share the love with your friends and family.

Proudly Made In The Land Down Under
Smith's potato chips are made with pride right here in Australia. Our potatoes are carefully grown and harvested by Aussie farmers, ensuring every chip is made from the finest potatoes. With Smith's commitment to quality and taste, you can be sure that every bag of Smith's chips is a true taste of down under.
  • Zesty vinegar tang with a salty finish on classic crinkle-cut chips.

  • Perfectly crisp crinkle cut chips made from Australian potatoes and seasoned with Smith's signature Salt & Vinegar blend.

  • Great for parties, game day spreads or anytime sharing is on the cards.

  • Australia's favourite chip brand, made only with Australian potatoes.

  • Gluten free and free from artificial flavours, these are potato chips with a satisfying crunch for anyone to enjoy.

long_description:
Snack Sensation For Your Adventures
When it's time for your next adventure and you're in search of a go-to snack to enjoy on your road trips or outdoor activities, Smith's Salt & Vinegar Chips will guarantee satisfaction for all! With a nice zesty snap and savoury notes to complement every bite, they'll be sure to bring the smiles all around. So embark on your next journey with Smith's Chips and enjoy those adventurous moments you're in!

Potato Snacks for Any Occasion
The Smith's Salt & Vinegar Crinkle Cut Chips are a true-blue classic that has become the go-to snacking option at any footy finals viewing or movie marathon nights.
Whether it's a cheeky late-night nibble or a party snack we know that the irresistible flavour means they're the potato chips that hit the spot no matter the occasion.

The Best Australian-made Lunch Snacks
Smith's Salt & Vinegar Chips are made down under and contain nothing but quality ingredients adored by Australians.
Our crisps are free from any artificial colours and flavours. They even pass the gluten-free test, so you know all your friends and family will come flocking when you crack open the bag to reveal that smell of tangy goodness.

They're the ultimate kids snack that even the adults can't get enough of.

You know you love 'em.
  • A crunchy gluten-free snack suitable for all your friends and family.

  • Smith's Salt & Vinegar Chips are made down under and contain nothing but quality ingredients adored by Australians.

  • Our potato chips are free from any artificial colours.

  • Perfect as a lunchbox snack or work break treat.

  • Made for sharing, they're the go-to snacking option for any footy finals viewing or road trip adventure.

  • 100% Australian Potatoes.

  • No Artificial Colours.

long_description:
Make Sharing More Fun With Twisties
When it's time for you to bring on the fun and share the joy at your next party, make sure to bring Twisties Chicken with you! Whether it's a Halloween-themed party or a Christmas gathering, our corn chips are the perfect snack to energise your guests of all ages.
Don't get it twisted either, our generous 270g party pack is ready to serve up a delicious twist when feeding the crowd. So hurry up and twist up your party snack game to new heights with Twisties Chicken, it's the crunch of happiness waiting to be experienced!

Just The Twist You Need On Adventures
Twisties Chicken is the perfect snack to complement any outdoor adventures. Whether you're embarking on a road trip, chilling in the park or exploring the great outdoors with friends, it's the finger-licking fun you didn't know you needed to twist up your outdoor activities. So why not enjoy all the twists and turns on your next adventure with a bag of Twisties Chicken.

Aussie Made With A Twist Of Love
Twisties Chicken is loved and enjoyed by anyone at any time, as we all know life's pretty straight without Twisties.
But what's the twist? We're proudly Australian made with only the finest ingredients. And with our unwavering commitment to quality of taste and passion, we continue to deliver corn chips with a twist of love through every delicious crunch.
  • Twisties Chicken is proudly Australian made with only the finest ingredients.

  • Party-sized Twisties to feed the crowd and satisfy tastebuds of all ages.

  • It's the twist of fun you need on adventures when creating memories with friends.

  • Ideal to fill snack bowls at your next Halloween-themed party or Christmas gathering.

  • The finger-licking and irresistible snack to be shared and enjoyed by anyone looking to twist up their snack game.
name: Twisties Snacks Party Bag Share Pack Chicken Cheese

Discover the incredible flavour of Pringles barbecue flavour stacked potato chips. Our chips are uniquely shaped and perfectly seasoned!

Experience the irresistible crunch and delicious flavour in every bite!

Great for sharing, it's the ideal savoury snack for a barbecue, picnic or party.

Once you pop, the fun don't stop!
  • Well seasoned to complement that rich potato taste.

  • Delicious combination of your favourite BBQ flavours

  • Suitable for vegetarians and vegans

  • Comes in a resealable can

  • Great for on-the-go snacking

  • A tempting bite to share with your friends.

long_description:
Australian-Made Using Natural Ingredients
Each pack of Red Rock Deli's Potato Chips are made in Australia with real ingredients and the finest potatoes harvested from Australian farms. Our natural potato chips are roughly cut and slow cooked to perfection, adding a drizzle of 100% sunflower oil for a satisfying crunch. Even without our classic Honey Soy flavour, Red Rock Deli's chips are a marvel of Australian snack cuisine.

Premium Deli Style Chips Made for Entertaining
Red Rock Deli Honey Soy Chicken chips are guaranteed to add that extra touch to your next dinner at home with friends. Our Honey Soy Chicken Potato Chips are sure to complement any cheese platter to create platter-worthy perfection. Don't hesitate to reach for Red Rock Deli at your next event, the ideal choice for those occasions when you want to impress.

No Frills, No Fuss
Red Rock Deli puts flavour first, trusting in the classic flavours we have been so proud of for decades now. We formulate each of our chip packs to hold the most amount of flavour it can hold to deliver the true taste of our potato chips without the frills. Guaranteed to satisfy even the fussiest of eaters, the toughest of foodies, and the most gourmet of tastebuds.
  • Made in Australia with the finest potatoes harvested from Australian farms.

  • Gluten-free potato chips, so everyone can enjoy a taste of Red Rock Deli excellence.

  • Natural deli-style chips with zero artificial colours, flavours or MSG.

  • You can taste the succulence of cooked chicken, the sweetness of freshly drizzled honey, and the subtle sharpness of soy in every bite.

  • For those entertaining occasions where you want to impress, serve up Red Rock Deli.

long_description:
Bring Out the Holiday Cheers with Cheetos Puffs
Our Party Size Share Packs are the perfect size for sharing around at your next event or gathering. Keep your guests cheering with the savoury crowd-pleaser that doubles as a tabletop stacker during Christmas Holiday lunch with the family. What's more, they're the perfect party bag size to keep ready behind the door when the trick-or-treaters come knocking on Halloween.

Tailor-Made for Parties and Entertaining
Cheetos Puffs Cheese Snack Share Packs are the ideal cheese snacks to keep the crowd going, no matter the occasion. Made with real cheese and suitable for vegetarians, they're the perfect people-pleaser and much-loved party snacks for all.

Heighten Your Favourite Outdoor Activities
Cheetos Cheese Puffs are the perfect snack to bring along while you're enjoying the great outdoors with friends and family. Whether you're dropping down to the local park for a quick skateboarding sesh or surfing at the beach to beat the summer heat, Cheetos are the crunchy corn snack everyone will happily chow down on.
  • Cheetos Puffs are delightfully airy and light, but still retain that classic Cheetos crunch we all know and love.

  • Cheetos Puffs Cheese Snacks are made with real cheese!

  • Ideal as the snack bowl filler for the Christmas Holiday family gatherings when snacking is at its most festive.

  • Our party bag sized share pack makes entertaining guests or hosting parties a breeze.

  • Made in Australia from only the highest quality corn.
name: Puffs Cheese Snacks Party Bag Cheese

long_description:
Light Crispy Texture

Baked, not fried, this range delivers a lighter potato chip experience without losing the familiar Smith's quality. These chips are big on flavour, with 50% less fat than Smith's Crinkle Cut Potato Chips. They offer a deliciously light and crispy texture, combined with the satisfying taste Smith's is known for.

Aussie Tradition And Pride

As an Australian-made snack, these baked potato chips reflect Smith's place as a long-standing pantry staple. The Baked range continues the brand's simple commitment to flavour and delivering high-quality snacks that the whole family can enjoy.

Snack Sharing Made Easy

With a 130g share pack, it slots easily into group settings such as picnics, weekend BBQs or footy nights. This chip's light texture and creamy flavour make it a tasty addition to any time spent with family and friends.
  • Smooth sour cream and chives flavour.

  • Baked, not fried, with 50% less fat thanSmith's Crinkle Cut Potato Chips.

  • A share-ready choice for picnics and BBQs.

  • Australian made.

  • No artificial colours or flavours.

long_description:
Reach For the Right Snack
Smith's potato chips have been providing Australians with delicious potato snacks for nearly 100 years, making them the brand you can trust your tastebuds with. In particular, the light texture of Smith's Thinly Cut Potato Chips Share Pack Sour Cream & Onion 175g means that you can enjoy these lightly tangy crisps at any point without ruining your appetite for lunch or dinner. These everyday, anytime chips will always be the right choice for your snacking needs.

Lunch Snacks Everyone Will Love
Who can say no to the undeniably delicious taste of sour cream and onion? Especially when this flavour is coating the thinly cut chips we all know and love from Smith's! The 175g share pack provides more than enough of the classic light but satisfying crunch of Smith's to go around when the cravings begin. These sour cream and onion chips pair perfectly with any food item, allowing everyone to make their dream meal. Whether you're looking to load your sandwich with the crunch of potato chips, or saving a handful for after a heavier meal, few will say Smith's chips are not one of the most beloved snacks to accompany any meal.

Australian-made for Aussie Mates
Smith's chips are Australia's pride and joy when it comes to snacking, having provided Aussies with the best potato snacks for sharing since 1931. Only the highest quality Australian-grown potatoes are chosen to be sliced thinly and cooked to crispiness, so you know you're getting a true taste of Australia when you share your 175g pack with mates. Footy finals, road trips, picnics, and any other event with friends are only made better when you split a pack of Smith's Thinly Cut Potato Chips Share Pack Sour Cream & Onion 175g.
  • Smith's Thinly Cut Potato Chips Share Pack Sour Cream & Onion 175g has a light texture that's packed with the lightly tangy creaminess of sour cream and onion in every bite.

  • Make the right choice for snack time by reaching for a portion of Smith's thinly cut potato chips.

  • With 175g in each share pack, there's more than enough to pass around at parties, the footy finals, or movie nights.

  • Australian-made with home-grown potatoes and Aussie loved.

  • These gluten free chips have no artificial colours or flavours.
